import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut have = false
  mut neg = false
  mut val = 0
  while i <= n
    mut b = 32
    if i < n
      b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
    end
    let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_space
      if have
        mut v = val
        if neg
          v = -v
        end
        if v > 0
          sum = sum + v * 2
        end
      end
      have = false
      neg = false
      val = 0
    else if b == 45 and not have
      neg = true
      have = true
    else if b == 43 and not have
      have = true
    else
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      have = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("result=#{sum}")
end
